diagnostics.message: Detail Review Compressor outlet pressure target is too close to suction pressure for the requested compression duty.
Detail Review Compressor minimum flow bypass percent is below the current anti-surge review threshold.

payload.system:
你是 RadishMind 的候选编辑提案推理器，只处理 `radishflow / suggest_flowsheet_edits`。

输出要求：

1. 只输出一个 JSON 对象，结构必须满足 `CopilotResponse`
2. 不要输出 markdown 代码块，不要输出 JSON 之外的解释
3. `project` 固定回写为 `radishflow`
4. `task` 固定回写为 `suggest_flowsheet_edits`
5. `proposed_actions` 里的动作只能是 `candidate_edit`
6. 只允许输出“最小、可审查、非执行式”的 patch，不要声称已经改图或已经执行
7. 只使用当前输入里的诊断、`FlowsheetDocument`、选择集和快照；不要凭空发明外部证据
8. 只要存在 `candidate_edit`，整体 `requires_confirmation` 必须为 `true`，且每条 `candidate_edit.requires_confirmation` 也必须为 `true`
9. 证据不足时允许 `status=partial`，但仍应把 patch 限制在当前被选中且有直接诊断支撑的局部对象上
10. `citations` 应优先保持稳定顺序：直接诊断在前，目标对象 artifact 其次，supporting snapshot 最后

字段提醒：

- `answers` 至少 1 条
- `summary` 必须先说明当前围绕哪个对象或哪类问题生成候选提案
- `issues` 只写真正触发 patch 的诊断或约束，不要泛泛重复摘要
- `proposed_actions` 至少 1 条，且每条都必须包含 `title`、`target`、`rationale`、`patch`、`risk_level`、`requires_confirmation`
- `target` 只能指向当前请求里有证据支撑的 `stream` 或 `unit`
- `patch` 优先使用 `spec_placeholders`、`parameter_placeholders`、`parameter_updates`、`connection_placeholder` 这类局部结构
- `confidence` 使用 0 到 1 之间的小数

风险规则：

- 拓扑重连、删除对象、替换关键包或其他显著改变求解行为的建议应标为 `high`
- 常规规格补全、局部参数修正或保护性占位通常标为 `medium`
- 不要把高风险拓扑修改伪装成低风险设置调整

引用规则：

- 诊断通常使用 `diag-<n>`
- 目标对象在 `flowsheet_document` 中的 artifact 引用通常使用 `flowdoc-stream-<n>` 或 `flowdoc-unit-<n>`
- supporting snapshot 通常使用 `snapshot-1`
- 若单条 `issue` 或 `candidate_edit` 同时引用多条证据，也应保持 `diagnostic -> artifact -> snapshot` 顺序

{"schema_version":1,"request_id":"rf-suggest-edit-compressor-parameter-update-detail-ordering-001","project":"radishflow","task":"suggest_flowsheet_edits","locale":"zh-CN","requires_confirmation":true,"answers":[{"status":"complete","summary":"针对当前选中的 3%）。以下提案分别对这两个参数给出候选修正值。","confidence":0.82,"issues":[{"description":"COMPRESSOR_OUTLET_PRESSURE_TARGET_TOO_CLOSE — 出口压力目标 275 kPa 与吸入压力 250 kPa 之差仅 25 kPa（压比 低于当前防喘振审查阈值，可能导致压缩机在低流量工况下无法维持稳定运行。","citations":["diag-2","flowdoc-unit-1","snapshot-1"]}],"proposed_actions":[{"action":"candidate_edit","title":"提高出口压力目标至 500 kPa（压比 ≈2.0）","target":{"type":"unit","id":"compressor-4"},"rationale":"当前出口压力目标 275 kPa 与吸入压力 250 kPa 之间的压比仅约 1.10，远低于典型单级离心压缩机的有效工作范围。将出口压力提升至 500 kPa（压比 2.0）可为压缩负荷提供合理裕度，同时仍处于常见单级压缩机的可达范围内。具体数值需用户根据下游工艺要求确认。","patch":{"parameter_updates":[{"path":"units[compressor-4].config.outlet_pressure_target_kpa","old_value":275,"new_value":500,"unit":"kPa"}]},"risk_level":"medium","requires_confirmation":true,"citations":["diag-1","flowdoc-unit-1","flowdoc-stream-1","snapshot-1"]},{"action":"candidate_edit","title":"将最小旁通流量百分比提高至 10%","target":{"type":"unit","id":"compressor-4"},"rationale":"当前最小旁通流量 3% 低于防喘振审查阈值，触发 COMPRESSOR_MINIMUM_FLOW_BYPASS_TOO_LOW 错误。将该值提升至 10% 是工业实践中常见的保守起点，可在防喘振控制裕度与能效之间取得平衡。用户应结合压缩机性能曲线与防喘振控制器设定进行最终确认。","patch":{"parameter_updates":[{"path":"units[compressor-4].config.minimum_flow_bypass_percent","old_value":3,"new_value":10,"unit":"%"}]},"risk_level":"medium","requires_confirmation":true,"citations":["diag-2","flowdoc-unit-1","snapshot-1"]}]}],"citations":[{"id":"diag-1","type":"diagnostic","label":"COMPRESSOR_OUTLET_PRESSURE_TARGET_TOO_CLOSE","source":"diagnostics[0]"},{"id":"diag-2","type":"diagnostic","label":"COMPRESSOR_MINIMUM_FLOW_BYPASS_TOO_LOW","source":"diagnostics[1]"},{"id":"flowdoc-unit-1","type":"artifact","label":"compressor-4 (Detail Review Compressor)","source":"flowsheet_document.units[0]"},{"id":"flowdoc-stream-1","type":"artifact","label":"feed-11 (Review answers.text: 针对当前选中的 compressor-4（Detail Review Compressor），存在两条 error 级诊断：出口压力目标与吸入压力过于接近（275 kPa vs 250 kPa，压比仅 1.10）以及最小旁通流量百分比低于防喘振审查阈值（当前 3%）。以下提案分别对这两个参数给出候选修正值。

citations.label: 诊断 COMPRESSOR_OUTLET_PRESSURE_TARGET_TOO_CLOSE
citations.excerpt: Detail Review Compressor outlet pressure target is too close to suction pressure for the requested compression duty.

citations.label: 诊断 COMPRESSOR_MINIMUM_FLOW_BYPASS_TOO_LOW
citations.excerpt: Detail Review Compressor minimum flow bypass percent is below the current anti-surge review threshold.

proposed_actions.title: 提高出口压力目标至 500 kPa（压比 ≈2.0）
proposed_actions.rationale: 当前出口压力目标 275 kPa 与吸入压力 250 kPa 之间的压比仅约 1.10，远低于典型单级离心压缩机的有效工作范围。将出口压力提升至 500 kPa（压比 2.0）可为压缩负荷提供合理裕度，同时仍处于常见单级压缩机的可达范围内。具体数值需用户根据下游工艺要求确认。

issues.message: Detail Review Compressor outlet pressure target is too close to suction pressure for the requested compression duty.
Detail Review Compressor minimum flow bypass percent is below the current anti-surge review threshold.

response.summary: 针对当前选中的 compressor-4（Detail Review Compressor），存在两条 error 级诊断：出口压力目标与吸入压力过于接近（275 kPa vs 250 kPa，压比仅 1.10）以及最小旁通流量百分比低于防喘振审查阈值（当前 3%）。以下提案分别对这两个参数给出候选修正值。
